headline: Starbucks, Amgen, and CVS Help This Income Fund Shine
summary: Hilda Applbaum, co-manager of the American Funds Income Fund of America, likes to buy inexpensive, high-yielding stocks poised for an upturn. Her strategy has trounced 98% of peers.
